message:
fix: add timeout to StartIsolatedDoltContainer context (bd-ilcx)

StartIsolatedDoltContainer used context.Background() without a timeout
for dolt.Run(), meaning a slow Docker pull or unresponsive container
could hang tests indefinitely. Add context.WithTimeout using
serverStartTimeout, matching the singleton startDoltContainer pattern.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jade
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
